docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY NASON, CHRIS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KARAMI, EDMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT NASON, CHRIS AS TO PLAINTIFF KARAMI, EDMAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00 SERVED AUG-12-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KARAMI, EDMAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF EDMAN KARAMI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRIS NASON IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: CROSS-COMPLAINANT CHRIS NASON IS PRESENT. CROSS-DEFENDANT EDMAN KARAMI IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KARAMI, EDMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASON, CHRIS $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,050.00, PLAINTIFF AGREED TO PATCH UP WINDOW CASINGS & SIDING ON BACK OF DEFENDANT'S HOME AND REMOVE WOODEN DECK FOR $6000. PLAINTIFF ADMITTED HE DID NOT COMPLETE THE WINDOW CASINGS, BUT HE DID SEAL THE SIDING AND REMOVE THE DECK IN SEPTEMBER 2024. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NASON, CHRIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT KARAMI, EDMAN DEFENDANT RECEIVED INITIAL BID OF $45,000 TO COMPLETE ALL NEEDED REPAIRS TO LIGHTWELL, CASINGS, SIDING. HE OPTED FOR A CHEAP "TEMPORARY" REPAIR FOR $6000. IT WAS EXCEPTIONALLY RAINY DURING WINTER 2024-2025. DEFENDANT DID NOT PROVE THAT PLAINTIFF'S' WORK CAUSED THE LEAKS HE EXPERIENCED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE "GUARANTEE" SIGNED IN FEB. 2025 IS AN UNENFORCEABLE CONTRACT OF ADHESION WHICH PLAINTIFF SIGNED UNDER DURESS AFTER DEFENDANT SAID HE WOULD PAY NOTHING UNLESS PLAINTIFF SIGNED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 09/08/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD RETURN TO SENDER)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY KARAMI, EDMAN AS TO DEFENDANT NASON, CHRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT NASON, CHRIS
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-20-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
